title: Reys Catpaintings
description: Changes all paintings to be of some cats I hold dear to me!
body: All paintings are changed to pictures of: Chicken potpie, Beef potpie, Soggy cat, Kiji, Canny Cat, Shock cat, Stella, and Fatcat! Includes a custom back too. I will update this as more paintings are made available, and may even add a few UI changes in it too :)! Report any issues to @rey.in_space on discord!
